name: The Past, Tonight with Mars Apollo
original_name: The Past, Tonight with Mars Apollo
overview: Mars Apollo is a universally-acclaimed TV personality who is finally premiering his own talk show! While other programs feature A-list celebrity guests, this show invites people from Mars’ life for a chance to reconnect.

trailers.title: "The Past, Tonight with Mars Apollo" Series Premiere TRAILER #webseries #promo #talkshow
